records.ety: [As if fr. a L. animalculum, dim. of animal.]

defs: A small animal, as a fly, spider, etc.
An animal, invisible, or nearly so, to the naked eye. See Infusoria.
notes: ☞ Many of the so-called animalcules have been shown to be plants, having locomotive powers something like those of animals. Among these are Volvox, the Desmidiacæ, and the siliceous Diatomaceæ.
